embed.title: !location
embed.description: Manage your default location and saved named locations. Distance filters (`d:<metres>`) measure from a location.

fields.name: Default location
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}location` — show your current default
`{{prefix}}location 51.5074,-0.1278` — set by lat,lon
`{{prefix}}location 10 Downing Street, London` — set by address (requires geocoder)
`{{prefix}}location remove default` — clear it

fields.name: Saved named locations
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}location add Home 51.5074,-0.1278` — save a named location by coords
`{{prefix}}location add Home Canterbury` — or by address (requires geocoder)
`{{prefix}}location add "Holiday Home" santa monica` — multi-word names need quotes
`{{prefix}}location list` — list default + all saved
`{{prefix}}location show Home` — show one (use `default` for the default location)
`{{prefix}}location remove Home` — delete (refuses if any tracking rule references it)

fields.name: Use on tracking rules
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}track pikachu d:500 location:Home` — distance check from Home instead of your default
`{{prefix}}track pikachu area:london,paris` — restrict to specific areas instead of your default areas

`location:` requires `d:`. `area:` and `d:` are mutually exclusive. `area:` and `location:` are mutually exclusive.

fields.name: Related
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}area` — manage your default areas
`{{prefix}}tracked` — see which rules use which override
